sq_candidate.initial_target: language model 2D projection, embedding, and lm_head weights

t0_t2_status.t1_jsonl_schema_preservation_note: run-external-benchmark.py preserves package-batch total-throughput metrics, prefix/chunk/context accounting, executor accounting, and memory.kv_cache_bytes_total in inference-benchmark-result-v0.1 JSONL rows.
t0_t2_status.t1_component_real_batch_jsonl_parser_not: run-external-benchmark.py --parse ullm-component-prefill preserves batching.mode=real, prefill_real_batch=true, request/token parallelism, prefill total input tok/s, attention pair/s, and sampled correctness for component prefill rows.
t0_t2_status.t2_artifact_metadata_path_note: build-sq-fp8-w8a16-artifact.py accepts --policy-json for sq-fp8-policy-v0.1; dry-run confirmed kup6_gate5_down5 resolves to 22 FP8 tensors, 753 passthrough tensors, and row_block32 scale.
t0_t2_status.t2_short_prompt_guard_note: One selected q_proj tensor and then the layer 3 projection set are loaded from SQ FP8 while the rest falls back to AQ4. The layer 3 projection-set guard matched AQ4 top1 in 3/3 short token-ID cases. Expanding to layers 3,7 changed top1 for attention-only, MLP-only, and attention+MLP overlays, while AQ4 top1 remained inside SQ top8. Family split shows q/v/down are risky for strict top1, while k/o/gate/up preserve top1 individually and as a combined subset across 3/3 short prompts. Expanding k/o/gate/up to layers 3,7,11,15 preserved top1 in 2/3 short prompts and failed case_a. Row-block scale recovers q at block32 and down at block64, but v remains strict-top1 risky for tested block sizes. A mixed candidate with v fallback and q/k/o/gate/up/down row-block32 FP8 passes layers 3,7,11,15 in 3/3 short prompts and layers 3,7,11,15,19 on len4. The same policy fails layers 3,7,11,15,19,23 and all self-attention probe layers. Layer 23 alone is fixed by q/v fallback, but 6-layer q/v fallback still fails, so cumulative drift remains. T2 promotion rule v0.1 is strict_top1; top-k/rank/gap are diagnostic-only. Six-layer family split shows k/up row-block32 passes strict top1 and k/up combined passes 3/3 short prompts, but o/gate/down fail individually at 6 layers. Per-layer combination search shows k/up all 6 plus any one or two of o/gate/down on layers 3,7,11,15,19 pass len4, while adding all three fails len4. The kup6_gate5_down5 prompt bundle passes len4, case_a, and case_b strict top1; case_a top8 overlap is only 2/8, so it is a six-layer regression subset rather than a full SQ policy. The selected FP8/fallback policy is saved as sq-fp8-kup6-gate5-down5-policy-v0.1. Full-target SQ guard is still pending and needs broader coverage, stronger format decisions, or a formally accepted text-level guard.

next_steps: T2: keep sq-fp8-materialize-smoke as the runtime artifact-boundary guard
T2: keep kup6_gate5_down5 as the current six-layer strict-top1 regression subset
T2: keep kup6_ogatedown5 as a near-miss failure guard
T2: use sq-fp8-kup6-gate5-down5-policy-v0.1.json through --policy-json as the current SQ policy representation for selected FP8 and fallback families
T2: keep strict_top1 as the promotion rule until a text-level guard is implemented and accepted
T2: use top-k overlap, AQ4 top1 rank, and logit gap as diagnostic-only fields
Planning: treat current prefill/cached-prefix attention speed as sufficient to resume SQ candidate evaluation; defer extra FlashAttention2-like work unless SQ comparison exposes a blocker
T1: use component real-batch rows only for kernel/schema validation, not final SQ package throughput
T1: implement a full package real batch executor before using total throughput rows for SQ performance decisions
T5: use native FP8 or materialization-aware runtime paths for throughput comparison; do not use SQ overlay load timing as an SQ speed result
T5: move to AQ4/FP8 throughput comparison after the T2 prompt-bundle subset is encoded and the accepted quality boundary is documented
T6/T7: run vLLM comparison only after uLLM R9700 batch=1/4/8 AQ4 and FP8 rows share the same schema
